# Nyxis

> Zero-copy binary serialization (NXS) — row, columnar, and PAX .nxb layouts.

Static markdown versions of each page (no JavaScript required):

- [Nyxis — Open massive structured datasets in the browser](https://www.nyxis.io/): https://www.nyxis.io/index.md
- [Documentation — Nyxis NXS quickstart](https://www.nyxis.io/docs/): https://www.nyxis.io/docs/index.md
- [Nyxis — High-Throughput System Topologies & Use Cases](https://www.nyxis.io/use-cases/): https://www.nyxis.io/use-cases/index.md
- [Nyxis — Commercial Pricing](https://www.nyxis.io/pricing/): https://www.nyxis.io/pricing/index.md
- [Benchmark — Nyxis NXS](https://www.nyxis.io/bench/): https://www.nyxis.io/bench/index.md
- [Demo — Nyxis NXS](https://www.nyxis.io/demo/): https://www.nyxis.io/demo/index.md
- [Ticker — Nyxis NXS](https://www.nyxis.io/demo/ticker): https://www.nyxis.io/demo/ticker.md
- [Workers — Nyxis NXS](https://www.nyxis.io/demo/workers): https://www.nyxis.io/demo/workers.md
- [Log explorer — Nyxis NXS](https://www.nyxis.io/demo/explorer): https://www.nyxis.io/demo/explorer.md
- [Report layout — Nyxis NXS](https://www.nyxis.io/demo/report): https://www.nyxis.io/demo/report.md
- [WAL / spans — Nyxis NXS](https://www.nyxis.io/demo/wal): https://www.nyxis.io/demo/wal.md

- API catalog: https://www.nyxis.io/.well-known/api-catalog
